required.reason: Required after the unchanged primitive passes the managed and native adapters and the native engine test proves that stylesheet left/center/right origins reach four nested scene-scale commands despite inline transforms. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-subset-transform-origin-20260722/{native,managed-verified-v2}/results.json.

Required after both adapters published multiple monotonic intermediate translate/scale frames and correct completion bounds. Native evidence: artifacts/web-platform-subset-transform-transition-v3-20260722/native/results.json; managed evidence: artifacts/web-platform-subset-transform-transition-v6-20260722/managed/results.json.

Required product-neutral temporal gate for automatically discoverable paint transitions; it samples forward and reversed intermediate frames and requires run/start/cancel/end event evidence without naming a product control.

Product-neutral temporal quality gate: start/end correctness is insufficient unless a 300ms rotation publishes at least fourteen monotonic intermediate frames with no gap above 25ms or angular jump above 20 degrees.

Required product-neutral reduction of an automatically discovered loader composition. It requires 24px consecutive row flow, an 18x4 three-dot loader, individually centered 4px dots, generated inline middle alignment, correct indefinite percentage-height behavior, and post-mutation :not(:last-child) spacing. Both adapters pass: artifacts/web-platform-subset-inline-loader-alignment-final-20260722/{managed,native}/results.json.

Required after all three unchanged upstream assertions pass in native and forced-portable runs: initial checkbox/radio/option state, dynamic input type removal, and programmatic checkbox/radio/option activation. Independent V8 identity, event-order, native raster, geometry, hit-testing, and state spikes preserve the operated component-control coverage. Evidence: TestResults/WebPlatformSubset-checked-required-native-final/results.json and TestResults/WebPlatformSubset-checked-required-portable-final/results.json.

Required after exact native and forced-portable reftest passes. Because both WPT sides use native markers, required status remains qualified by the independent green R5 native marker pixel gate; the reftest alone could false-pass if both sides omitted marker paint.

Required after exact native and forced-portable reftest passes. The independent green R5 native marker pixel gate remains part of the evidence because marker omission on both reftest sides could otherwise mask a failure.

Required after exact native and forced-portable reftest passes. Required status remains coupled to the independent green marker geometry/raster and initial-font-metrics authorities so a test/reference marker omission or shared font fallback cannot create a false pass.

Required after exact native and forced-portable reftest passes. Independent native/portable geometry and V8 authored-text regressions retain coverage for the hypothetical inline insertion point and whitespace semantics exercised by the WPT.

Required after the unchanged two-subtest WPT passes in exact native and forced-portable runs. Required status remains coupled to the independent green local ancestor-bubbling spike and a high-DPI connected-component focus/highlight gate because this WPT listens on each focused target rather than an ancestor.

Required after the unchanged upstream keyboard-modality test passes in exact native and forced-portable runs. Required status remains coupled to the independent Avalonia NavigationMethod.Tab authority and an operated connected-menu gate; the bounded runner adapter supports only the WebDriver Tab action exercised here. Evidence: TestResults/WebPlatformSubset-focus-visible-cssom-{native,portable}/results.json.

Required after all 12 unchanged upstream pointer-focus subtests pass in exact native and forced-portable runs across tabindex spans, button, image/reset/submit, checkbox, radio, range, and color inputs. Required status remains coupled to the independent modality authority and an operated connected-menu gate; the bounded runner adapter supports the primary click used here. Evidence: TestResults/WebPlatformSubset-focus-visible-cssom-{native,portable}/results.json.

Required after the settled unchanged XHTML reference passes exact pixels in optimized native and forced-portable runs. This replaces the earlier false pass from a prematurely captured blank reference and is coupled to independent positioned-control geometry gates. Evidence: TestResults/WebPlatformSubset-candidate-post-focus-{native,portable}/results.json.

Required after all four unchanged upstream assertions pass in optimized native and forced-portable runs: author !important survives inline add, modification, and removal. The run also exercises browser-compatible window named-property lookup. Evidence: TestResults/WebPlatformSubset-candidate-post-focus-{native,portable}/results.json.

Required after exact native and forced-portable passes of the unchanged reftest. Vertical percentage-bearing calc() relative insets correctly become auto when the containing-block height is indefinite, while the independent authority retains definite and negative-length coverage. Evidence: TestResults/WebPlatformSubset-relative-inset-fixed-{native,portable}/results.json.

Required after both unchanged upstream hit assertions pass in native and forced-portable runs. getBoundingClientRect uses transformed corner extents and elementFromPoint inverse-transforms the viewport point into the local border box, coupled to an independent scaled geometry/half-open edge authority. Evidence: TestResults/WebPlatformSubset-transform-hittest-fixed-{native,portable}/results.json.

Required after the unchanged upstream assertion passes in exact native and forced-portable runs. Computed style serializes the applied transform matrix, while independent Chrome-authority regressions preserve authored noncommutative transform-list order in Avalonia's row-vector model. Evidence: TestResults/WPT-transform-order-{native,portable}/results.json.

Required after the unchanged upstream negative-translation assertion passes in exact native and forced-portable runs. The same computed matrix is used for visual application and CSSOM serialization, coupled to independent ordered-composition tests. Evidence: TestResults/WPT-transform-order-{native,portable}/results.json.

Required after the unchanged upstream reftest passes exact pixels in native and forced-portable runs. Fixed row and column tracks, gap, source-order auto placement, and collapsible authored whitespace are coupled to an independent V8 iframe geometry/raster authority. Evidence: TestResults/WebPlatformSubset-grid-rows-final-{native,portable}/results.json.

Required product-neutral reduction of a shared managed/native jQuery CSS Grid placement failure. It covers the bounded integer/auto slice of grid-area, grid-row, grid-column, and their four placement longhands, including stylesheet cascade, longhand precedence, CSSOM removal, and synchronous computed serialization. Chrome, managed, and native pass 6/6 assertions. Upstream authority: css/css-grid/parsing/grid-area-computed.html and grid-area-valid.html. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-grid-placement-{chrome,managed,native}-v1-20260723/results.json.

Required after the unchanged upstream block generated-content reftest passes exact pixels in native and forced-portable runs. Literal pseudo text is measured as intrinsic content, participates in normal flow, and paints through a DOM-invisible carrier without entering the DOM or flex item list. Evidence: TestResults/WebPlatformSubset-generated-current-{native,portable}-block/results.json.

Required after the unchanged upstream generated-pseudo flex reftest passes exact pixels in native and forced-portable runs. Literal before/after text preserves source ordering, intrinsic sizing, align-self, background paint, and anonymous authored text behavior; independent spikes retain native/portable geometry and raster proof. Evidence: TestResults/WebPlatformSubset-generated-current-{native,portable}-flex/results.json.

Required after the unchanged upstream positioned generated-content reftest passes exact pixels in native and forced-portable runs. Out-of-flow generated backgrounds use the shared containing-block resolver, current-pass layout slots, and the precomputed portable absolute containing block, coupled to an isolated live ICB geometry/raster authority.

Required after the unchanged product-neutral contract passes both native and managed adapters. It requires all four modeled inherited components to agree through camelCase CSSOM and getPropertyValue(), retain declared control geometry, and update after an ancestor mutation. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-font-inherit-v1/results.json and artifacts/web-platform-font-inherit-managed-v1/results.json.

Required after the unchanged product-neutral contract passes both native and managed adapters. It requires stale layout/paint/transform state to clear while inheritance, custom properties, later declarations, and higher-priority inline sizing remain intact. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-all-unset-{native-v2,managed-v4}/results.json.

Required after the unchanged product-neutral reftest passes exact pixels in both adapters. It proves that authored top/left geometry, sizing, border radius, and positive z-index on a generated indicator compose above a lower-z real child. Native evidence: artifacts/web-platform-pseudo-positioned-v3/native/results.json; managed evidence: artifacts/web-platform-pseudo-positioned-v3/managed/results.json.

Required after the unchanged product-neutral reftest passes exact pixels in both adapters. All four observed logical inline longhands must match their physical left/right equivalents, including content placement and following-sibling geometry. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-logical-inline-v1/{native,managed}/results.json.

Required after the exact product-neutral reftest passes both adapters. It covers literal and CSS-authored fill/stroke, author override of black presentation attributes, inherited HTML color, currentColor resolution, and native SVG rasterization. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-svg-chevron-v3/{native,managed}/results.json.

Required after the product-neutral interaction passes both adapters. It requires browser pointer/mouse boundary ordering, fixed-child popup geometry and hit ownership, parent hover continuity across the descendant, child activation, and one close on exit. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-submenu-lifecycle-v3/{native,managed}/results.json.

Required after the interaction contract passes both adapters and the native ABI regression independently proves host hand-cursor projection, one typed system-default-browser request, preventDefault suppression, and unchanged HtmlML location. WPT evidence: artifacts/web-platform-cursor-external-v2/{native,managed}/results.json; native authority: test_pointer_cursor_and_external_anchor_host_handoff.

Required after the product-neutral contract passes both adapters. It preserves the original failing reduction while proving self insertion, sibling reorder, cross-parent reparenting, and failure atomicity. Evidence: artifacts/dom-insertbefore-v4-current-native/results.json and the managed counterpart.

Required after all 12 independently named assertions pass both adapters. The matrix extends the observed insertBefore failure into the related Node, ParentNode, ChildNode, and Element mutation surface and requires return values, identity, order, reparenting, detachment, idempotence, hierarchy rejection, and rejected-operation atomicity. Evidence: artifacts/dom-related-tree-mutation-v4/{native,managed}/results.json.

Required after exact pixels pass both adapters and the generic topology scenario independently proves DOM panes 2 to 1, native canvas bands 2 to 1, and separators 1 to 0. Evidence: artifacts/dom-tree-mutation-render-v2-current-native/results.json and artifacts/dom-tree-mutation-render-v2-managed/results.json.

Required after the exact product-neutral reftest passes both adapters and the native ABI regression independently proves connected descendant canvases enter the scene, retain DOM parent identity after ancestor detachment, disappear from document queries, and leave native canvas layout/display-list publication. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-subset-candidate-v25-detached-canvas/{native,managed}/results.json and test_detached_canvas_descendants_leave_native_scene.

Required after both adapters pass the unchanged upstream reftest exactly. It proves wrapped-line collection before flexible-length resolution, independent per-line shrink, definite cross-axis stretch, margin-constrained shrink, preserved oversized flex:none overflow, single margin authority, and the bounded consecutive-left-float reference construction. Native and managed regressions additionally cover mirrored right-float placement and float CSSOM reflection. Broader float intrusion, clear, shape-outside, bidi interaction, and arbitrary mixed flow remain outside the certified slice. Evidence: artifacts/wpt-flex-wrap-native-v2-20260722/results.json and artifacts/wpt-flex-wrap-managed-v2-20260722/results.json.

Required after the unchanged product-neutral reduction passes both adapters and the exact version-pinned jQuery, Bootstrap, and React DOM consumer matrix passes 3/3 documents and 16/16 assertions in Chrome, managed, and native. The claim covers the selected collection/property slice; live HTMLCollection named access and the wider form-control API remain outside it. Evidence: artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-matrix-v9-20260722/ecosystem-results.json and artifacts/web-platform-required-ecosystem-promoted-v1-20260722.

Required after both adapters pass the exact listener registration, dispatch, removal, and post-removal lifecycle reduction and Bootstrap's selected Popper lifecycle passes in the three-engine matrix. Listener options, AbortSignal integration, passive semantics, and the complete EventTarget surface remain outside this bounded claim. Evidence: artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-matrix-v9-20260722/ecosystem-results.json and artifacts/web-platform-required-ecosystem-promoted-v1-20260722.

Required after both adapters pass the exact DOMString coercion and nullable-namespace reduction and Bootstrap's selected ARIA lifecycle passes in the three-engine matrix. This does not claim the complete Web IDL conversion or namespace-validation surface. Evidence: artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-matrix-v9-20260722/ecosystem-results.json and artifacts/web-platform-required-ecosystem-promoted-v1-20260722.

Required after both adapters pass variadic add/remove and force-toggle semantics and Bootstrap collapse passes in the three-engine matrix. The strengthened assertion additionally requires a token mutation on an element without a class attribute to create and reflect that attribute; direct Chrome, both adapters, the required profile, and the expanded ecosystem matrix pass it. Invalid-token exception behavior and the complete DOMTokenList surface remain outside this bounded claim. Evidence: artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-matrix-v9-20260722/ecosystem-results.json, artifacts/web-platform-required-ecosystem-promoted-v1-20260722, artifacts/web-platform-chrome-class-webidl-v75-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-required-v78-dom-attribute-promoted-20260723, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-matrix-v77-class-webidl-regression-20260723/ecosystem-results.json.

Required after the unchanged product-neutral reduction passes direct Chrome, managed, and native, and the native same-object fix makes all 31 cases of Bootstrap 5.3.8's unmodified Toast suite pass without a framework-specific branch. The contract proves Element.classList identity, live class reflection, method shadowing, and identity across detach/reconnect; invalid-token exceptions and the wider DOMTokenList surface remain outside this bounded claim. Evidence: artifacts/wpt-dom-token-list-same-object-chrome-v1-20260723, artifacts/wpt-dom-token-list-same-object-adapters-v1-20260723, and artifacts/ecosystem-bootstrap-toast-native-same-object-v1-20260723.

Required after both adapters pass the selected Node interface constants and Bootstrap's element guard passes in the three-engine matrix. Evidence: artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-matrix-v9-20260722/ecosystem-results.json and artifacts/web-platform-required-ecosystem-promoted-v1-20260722.

Required after Chrome confirms the empty live document root projects to its viewport, both adapters pass the unchanged geometry reduction, and Bootstrap's selected Popper placement lifecycle passes in the three-engine matrix. Required after both adapters pass the bounded text/html body/query/mutation/serialization reduction and Bootstrap tooltip and popover sanitation passes in all three engines. Required after both adapters pass the two-assertion attribute-record reduction, matching React markup hydrates without replacement, and Bootstrap sanitizer enumeration succeeds in Chrome, managed, and native. Required after the unchanged event-object identity and expando reduction passes Chrome, managed, and native, and Bootstrap carousel event payload/class/ARIA lifecycle passes the three-engine consumer matrix. Required after the complete 23-assertion product-neutral reduction passes direct Chrome, managed, and native; the complete required profile passes 83/83 documents and 260/260 assertions on both adapters; and jQuery 4.0.0's 65 selected unchanged attributes cases pass in the 14-document, 395-assertion three-engine ecosystem matrix. Material failures were fixed in shared DOM, form, parser, CSSOM, selector-state, class-reflection, and Web IDL bridge primitives rather than consumer-specific code. The contract is bounded to its enumerated factories, reflection, selectedness/reset, parsing, and inert-script cases and does not claim the complete DOM, HTML forms, XML, CSSOM, or Web IDL surfaces. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-chrome-class-webidl-v75-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-dom-attribute-reflection-managed-v14-class-presence-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-dom-attribute-reflection-native-v5-webidl-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-required-v78-dom-attribute-promoted-20260723, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-matrix-v77-class-webidl-regression-20260723/ecosystem-results.json.

Required after the same 4/4 product-neutral assertions pass direct Chrome, managed, and rebuilt native. The contract bounds CSSStyleDeclaration feature detection, invalid-value retention, empty-value removal, expando isolation, and disconnected resolved-style behavior exposed by jQuery's unchanged css.js suite. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-cssom-inline-validity-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-cssom-inline-validity-managed-v2-20260723/results.json, and artifacts/web-platform-cssom-inline-validity-native-v1-20260723/results.json.

Required after the same 4/4 product-neutral assertions pass direct Chrome, managed, and rebuilt native, with the pinned subpixel-table reftest revalidated after narrowing host rounding. It requires computed pixel serialization and client geometry to agree for percentage insets, percentage and automatic margins, and fractional connected dimensions. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-css-used-values-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-css-used-values-managed-v6-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-css-used-values-native-v2-20260723/results.json, and artifacts/web-platform-subpixel-table-managed-v2-20260723/results.json.

Required after the same 5/5 product-neutral lifecycle assertions pass direct Chrome, managed, and rebuilt native and the native C++ suite remains green. The native fix represents inline, inline-block, and list-item distinctly and makes offset geometry respect hidden ancestors; it closes eight unchanged jQuery CSS assertions without framework-specific runtime code. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-display-restoration-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-display-restoration-htmlml-v1-20260723/managed/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-display-restoration-native-v3-20260723/results.json, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-display-restoration-v1-20260723/ecosystem-results.json.

Required after Chrome, managed, and native pass all 3/3 product-neutral SCRIPT raw-text assertions. Executable and non-JavaScript SCRIPT contents remain raw text, style-like source cannot enter the document cascade, and inert data blocks remain in the DOM without execution. The shared loader fix closes upstream jQuery toggle and visibility failures without consumer-specific behavior. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-script-raw-text-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-script-raw-text-managed-v2-20260723/results.json, and artifacts/web-platform-script-raw-text-native-v3-20260723/results.json.

Required after Chrome, managed, and native pass all 5/5 product-neutral selector-error assertions and the unchanged jQuery visibility path uses its standards-compatible fallback. Document and Element selector APIs, matches(), closest(), and borrowed prototype methods throw DOMException SyntaxError for malformed selectors, unsupported pseudo-classes, and invalid selector lists. Upstream mapping: dom/nodes/selectors.js invalidSelectors and runInvalidSelectorTest/runInvalidSelectorTestMatches. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-selector-syntax-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-selector-syntax-managed-v1-20260723/results.json, and artifacts/web-platform-selector-syntax-native-v1-20260723/results.json.

Required after Chrome, managed, and native pass both product-neutral assertions and the unchanged jQuery toggle case advances without a missing-global error. Window.name exists as a mutable own string property, reflects through bare global access, and takes precedence over a same-named document element. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-window-name-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json and artifacts/web-platform-window-name-htmlml-v1-20260723.

Required after Chrome, managed, and native pass all 3/3 product-neutral rendering assertions and the unchanged jQuery :visible/:hidden assertions pass. An input whose type is hidden computes to display:none and publishes no offsets or client rectangles; changing between hidden and text synchronously updates style and geometry. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-hidden-input-chrome-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-hidden-input-managed-v1-20260723/results.json, and artifacts/web-platform-hidden-input-native-v2-20260723/results.json.

Required after Chrome, managed, and native pass all 4/4 product-neutral assertions and the unchanged jQuery computed-margin case passes both HtmlML adapters. CSSOM margin shorthand retains automatic values, connected used values distribute the remaining inline space around a text-bearing block, geometry agrees, and width mutation recomputes the distribution. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-dynamic-auto-margin-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-dynamic-auto-margin-fixed-v1-20260723/managed/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-dynamic-auto-margin-native-fixed-v2-20260723/results.json, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-auto-margin-native-fixed-v1-20260723/ecosystem-results.json.

Required unchanged at pinned WPT revision 2c705104a295c48053eeddf7fe0170d790a4e853 after both HtmlML adapters pass all 6/6 check-layout assertions. It provides upstream CSS2 authority for opposing and single-sided automatic margin used values in both LTR and RTL block formatting contexts. The runner now preserves BODY onload test startup generically instead of modifying the upstream bytes. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-auto-margins-wpt-htmlml-v2-20260723.

Required after Chrome and both HtmlML adapters pass all 6/6 product-neutral assertions and the originating unchanged jQuery custom-property case passes. It distinguishes CSS whitespace from vertical-tab token data, preserves case-sensitive stylesheet and inline names, activates STYLE nodes parsed either connected or detached and moved into the live tree, keeps empty custom properties out of CSSStyleDeclaration named-property lookup, and invalidates computed values after text mutation. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-custom-property-cssom-chrome-v3-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-custom-property-managed-fix-v6-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-custom-property-native-fix-v4-20260723/results.json, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-custom-property-fixed-v2-20260723/ecosystem-results.json.

Required unchanged at pinned WPT revision 2c705104a295c48053eeddf7fe0170d790a4e853 after both HtmlML adapters pass all 73/73 assertions. It covers inline and computed custom-property definition, overwrite, case sensitivity, CSS-whitespace serialization, importance, inheritance, and CSSOM name validation. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-variable-definition-managed-fix-v3-20260723/results.json and artifacts/web-platform-variable-definition-native-fix-v1-20260723/results.json.

Required after Chrome and both HtmlML adapters pass all 5/5 product-neutral assertions and the unchanged jQuery numeric box-edge allowlist advances through every padding case. It requires shorthand token retention and expansion, independent longhand override, content-box computed dimensions distinct from border-box geometry, synchronous layout invalidation, and declaration removal. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-cssom-box-edges-chrome-final-v3-20260723, artifacts/web-platform-cssom-box-edges-htmlml-final-v3-20260723/padding, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-box-edges-final-v4-20260723.

Required after Chrome and both HtmlML adapters pass all 4/4 product-neutral assertions and the originating unchanged jQuery numeric box-edge allowlist passes completely in native. It requires border shorthand/style composition, one-to-four width expansion, physical-side width/color override, content-box computed dimensions, and synchronous border-box geometry. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-cssom-box-edges-chrome-final-v3-20260723, artifacts/web-platform-cssom-box-edges-htmlml-final-v3-20260723/border, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-box-edges-final-v4-20260723.

Required after Chrome and both HtmlML adapters pass all 4/4 product-neutral assertions. It distinguishes computed style from box generation: explicit absolute heights on a text input, textarea, and ordinary block remain 20px beneath a display:none ancestor while offsets and client rectangles remain zero, then geometry returns without changing those computed heights when the ancestor is revealed. The originating unchanged jQuery hidden-input assertion passes in native. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-hidden-subtree-z-index-chrome-final-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-required-hidden-subtree-z-index-promoted-v1-20260723/{managed,native}/results.json, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-hidden-subtree-z-index-final-v1-20260723/ecosystem-results.json.

Required after Chrome and both HtmlML adapters pass all 3/3 product-neutral assertions and the unchanged jQuery css(String|Hash) test advances to completion in native. Numeric zIndex IDL assignment serializes as a string integer, survives connection and stylesheet recascade, accepts kebab-case negative-integer mutation, and restores the lower stylesheet declaration after inline removal. Native paint retains the established retained-canvas overlay invariant while preserving the observable inline z-index. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-hidden-subtree-z-index-chrome-final-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-required-hidden-subtree-z-index-promoted-v1-20260723/{managed,native}/results.json, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-hidden-subtree-z-index-final-v1-20260723/ecosystem-results.json.

Required after unchanged bytes pass all 4/4 assertions in Chrome and both HtmlML adapters, closing exactly the originating unchanged jQuery css(nonexistent) assertion in managed. CSSStyleDeclaration.getPropertyValue returns an empty string for an unknown property while unsupported and custom names remain absent from named-property access; supported names remain available through browser-shaped camel-case and kebab-case aliases. The same catalog exposes implemented logical-property aliases such as insetInlineStart, preserving the complete candidate denominator. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-computed-style-named-properties-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-required-computed-style-named-properties-v1-20260723/{managed,native}/results.json, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-computed-style-named-properties-v3-20260723/ecosystem-results.json.

Required after unchanged bytes pass all 4/4 assertions in Chrome and both HtmlML adapters, closing exactly the originating unchanged jQuery detached show/attach assertion in managed. Reading computed style while detached exposes disconnected empty values without authoring an inline override or allowing the detached snapshot to survive reattachment; connection recascades stylesheet display:none and suppresses boxes. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-detached-computed-reattach-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-required-detached-computed-reattach-v1-20260723/{managed,native}/results.json, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-detached-computed-reattach-v1-20260723/ecosystem-results.json.

Required after unchanged bytes pass all 4/4 assertions in Chrome and both HtmlML adapters, closing exactly the originating unchanged managed jQuery frame-element CSS assertion. A connected source-less iframe synchronously exposes its initial about:blank Window and Document with contentWindow/document/defaultView/frameElement identity; document.open/write/close replaces queryable body content without changing the connected contentDocument; and the frame window reads the default ltr computed direction while its iframe owner is display:none. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-iframe-document-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-iframe-document-htmlml-v5-20260723/{managed,native}/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-required-iframe-document-final-serial-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-required-iframe-document-final-v1-20260723/native/results.json, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-iframe-document-v1-20260723/ecosystem-results.json.

Required after unchanged bytes pass all 4/4 assertions in Chrome and both HtmlML adapters, closing the final unchanged managed jQuery CSS assertion and bringing the complete ecosystem denominator to 450/450 in Chrome, managed, and native. Opposing percentage insets retain independent used values; dynamic CSSOM percent-to-em replacement follows the element's inherited font; the four-value inset shorthand re-resolves after ancestor font mutation; and width, min-height, padding, gap, and flex-basis expose consistent pixel computed values. Native layout and paint resolve em/rem from the owning element/root context rather than a hard-coded metric, while CSSOM inset and flex-basis survive connection and recascade. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-font-relative-box-chrome-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-font-relative-box-htmlml-v3-20260723/{managed,native}/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-font-relative-box-htmlml-v4-20260723/native/results.json, and artifacts/ecosystem-consumers-font-relative-box-final-v1-20260723/ecosystem-results.json.

Required after the corrected unchanged bytes pass all 3/3 assertions in Chrome and both HtmlML adapters. The contract proves whitespace-only ::after content on a true inline child contributes advance before the next fragment, an absolutely positioned percentage-translated marker is centered, and a padded text label shares Chrome's first-baseline geometry with a non-text timeline track. Chrome rejected the earlier inline-block formulation because trailing collapsible whitespace inside an atomic inline-level box correctly collapses; that evidence was retained and the assertion was corrected before promotion. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-inline-status-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json (rejected formulation), artifacts/web-platform-inline-status-chrome-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-inline-status-managed-fixed-v3-20260723/results.json, and artifacts/web-platform-inline-status-native-current-v2-20260723/results.json.

Required after unchanged bytes pass all 8/8 assertions in Chrome and both HtmlML adapters. The bounded contract proves computed font axes, pair kerning, combining-mark clustering, letter and word spacing, one collapsed inter-element whitespace advance, shaped wrapping without clipping, inline indicator centering, and finite Arabic and Devanagari geometry without application selectors. Managed raster authority separately proves word spacing changes painted glyph placement rather than only the reported box. Exact cross-browser raster identity, downloadable test fonts, multi-face fallback, bidi ordering, vertical writing, variation axes, font-feature settings, hyphenation, and editing grapheme navigation remain outside this promotion. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-font-shaping-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-font-shaping-managed-fixed-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-font-shaping-native-current-v1-20260723/results.json, and CssTextSpacingTests.

Required after corrected unchanged bytes pass Chrome and both HtmlML adapters. The browser-authorized contract requires a finite scroll range, queued scroll events at changed boundaries, saturation at both ends, no duplicate event at an unchanged boundary, overflow hit-test clipping, and synchronous extent/offset re-clamping after content shrink and re-expansion. Chrome rejected the earlier candidate because a layout-taking scrollbar induced a horizontal scrollbar, an absolutely positioned tail legitimately preserved overflow after the nominal parent height shrank, and scroll events were asserted synchronously. The corrected contract removes those false assumptions. Managed raster authority and native scene tests independently require a proportional visible overlay thumb that moves with the bounded offset. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-overflow-scroll-chrome-v1-20260723/results.json (rejected formulation), artifacts/web-platform-overflow-scroll-chrome-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-overflow-scroll-managed-fixed-v2-20260723/results.json, artifacts/web-platform-overflow-scroll-native-current-v2-20260723/results.json, OverflowViewportClipsHitTestingAndReclampsAfterExtentMutation, and test_native_overflow_scrolling_and_nowrap.

candidate.reason: Product-neutral reduction of browser primitives discovered by loading ordinary hosted static pages: jQuery requires createHTMLDocument with an isolated body, Webflow reads document.location and document.links, and transition feature detection uses kebab-case CSSStyleDeclaration aliases. Keep candidate until the unchanged contract passes both adapters; the native integration gate separately requires both release themes to remain script-error-free through wide/narrow/wide reflow.

Product-neutral reduction for two adjacent rounded segments whose touching border sides are zero-width. Adapter-neutral assertions require exact box adjacency and asymmetric outer/inner radii; native paint authority additionally requires both open-edge centerlines to terminate at the same coordinate without using the multi-colour corner-partition mode. Keep candidate until managed paint preserves asymmetric corner radii as well as its computed values.

Product-neutral reduction of a common CSS spinner shape. The adapter-neutral assertions require square border-box geometry, four non-zero percentage radii, uniform widths, and two per-side colour groups. The native paint authority separately requires two rounded stroke commands whose side flags cover the full ring, so correct computed style cannot mask square rectangular-strip paint.

Product-neutral reduction of a three-dot composition: opacity @keyframes, a one-second infinite cycle, and three staggered delays. Native publishes at least sixty frames with bounded cadence and distinct opacity values. Keep candidate until the managed adapter implements the same bounded CSS Animations slice. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-subset-opacity-keyframes-final-20260722/results.json.

Product-neutral reduction of a 900ms infinite rotate(1turn) composition. Native publishes at least fifty host-clock frames, forty distinct angles, a real cycle wrap, no gap above 25ms, and no angular step above 15 degrees. Keep candidate until the managed adapter implements the same CSS Animations slice. Evidence: artifacts/web-platform-subset-keyframes-final-20260722/results.json.

Product-neutral lifecycle reduction for document and scroll events observed in complex hosted components. It requires interactive/complete readiness ordering and a real overflow scrollTop mutation that publishes exactly one targeted scroll event.

Product-neutral interaction reduction for keyboard, focus, and text-input lifecycles observed in complex hosted components. The adapter drives a printable ASCII key and WebDriver Tab through each engine; the assertions require event order and fields, value mutation, activeElement transfer, and both bubbling and non-bubbling focus event families. Native evidence passes 3/3 after the independent focus-visible adapter regression also passes: artifacts/observed-keyboard-focus-input-v2-native/results.json and artifacts/focus-visible-adapter-regression-v2/results.json. Managed passes 1/3 and retains explicit candidate-only gaps for beforeinput sequencing and post-Tab keyup targeting: artifacts/observed-keyboard-focus-input-v1/managed/results.json.

Product-neutral exact event-lifecycle reduction for native pointer and mouse event families observed in complex hosted components. It independently requires movement, entry, primary activation, exit, event ordering, coordinate/button fields, relatedTarget, and stopImmediatePropagation across same-target and ancestor mouseup recognizers. Native evidence passes 4/4: artifacts/web-platform-native-input-propagation-v2-20260723/results.json. Managed passes 3/4 and retains the existing explicit adapter gap because its testdriver bridge does not synthesize the initial movement event: artifacts/web-platform-managed-input-propagation-v4-20260723/results.json.

Product-neutral, independently named assertions for the generic DOM/runtime mechanisms behind the remaining supported hosted component observations. App-specific data and custom-event names are deliberately reduced to generic attribute/dataset and EventTarget round-trips rather than treated as distinct browser features. The expanded native fixture passes 7/7 with inert-script defer, image src, inline style, and parsed data-attribute retention: artifacts/observed-dom-runtime-v5-parser-attrs/native/results.json.

Exact-pixel reduction for the two legacy aliases observed in the hosted stylesheet corpus. The reference uses the unprefixed property or physical placement so merely retaining the authored token cannot pass.

Exact-pixel product-neutral reduction of the highest-use supported pseudo-element rows. The expanded reference uses principal boxes for physical margins, currentColor, opacity, and generated text metrics so ignored declarations cannot share the same failure mode.

Independent product-neutral assertions for the highest-use supported CSS box and layout rows that remained uncovered after the initial CSS Cascade, CSSOM, and Custom Properties expansion. The expanded native lane passes 19/19 assertions, including distinct four-edge shorthand parsing, CSSOM serialization, and bounded table-row vertical alignment; keep candidate until the managed compatibility gaps are reviewed.
Native passes 4/4 with distinct live HTML/BODY roots and initial-value serialization; this remains candidate because the managed adapter still reports authored inherit for all four computed values.
Product-neutral chart-shaped composition covering Canvas 2D and Path2D operations observed in complex hosted components.
Product-neutral assertions for every media type and media feature observed in the hosted-component corpus.
Product-neutral assertions for selector families observed in the hosted-component corpus.

Product-neutral reduction of an external SVG badge composition. Native must preserve all four CSS longhands and independently emit the loaded SVG at the certified scene coordinates. Keep candidate until the managed adapter gains equivalent background-image paint; native authority is test_svg_background_image_reaches_scene_with_position_and_size.
Product-neutral exact-pixel reduction that distinguishes subtree group opacity from fading only an element's own background.

Product-neutral reduction of the hosted-page startup failure discovered when a third-party analytics script read window.screen.width. It requires stable Screen identity, finite dimensions and depth metadata in both the top-level Window and a same-origin iframe. Keep candidate until the unchanged bytes pass Chrome and both HtmlML adapters.

harnessBlocked.reason: This pinned CSS2 visual case verifies that list-style:square produces a square marker, but it has neither rel=match nor testharness assertions. The subset runner cannot execute self-verifying visual tests unchanged, and the case does not exercise list-style-position:inside or first-line participation. Keep it harness-blocked and use the independent local marker-pixel gate for this base rule.

This is the closest CSS2 visual statement of the exact rule: an inside marker participates on the first line while the following forced line starts at the principal block edge. It has no rel=match or assertions, so the current exact-match/testharness adapter cannot execute it unchanged; the runner-compatible nested-list reftest remains candidate and the minimal local reduction must carry the precise geometry claim.

This is the nearest official WPT and exactly asserts the base rule that visibility:hidden suppresses paint without removing layout boxes. It is a self-verifying visual test without rel=match, and it does not compose inherited hidden visibility with generated ::before content. Keep it harness-blocked; the product-neutral native/portable regression covers that exact composition and synchronous geometry read.

This exact upstream coverage is a self-overlaid visual test without rel=match or testharness assertions. The product-neutral pixel spike now covers the primitive; promote after the subset runner can evaluate self-verifying visual tests.

This is the nearest official WPT for the base shorthand rule: it checks one-value expansion and a three-value horizontal/two-value vertical ellipse. It is a self-overlaid visual test without rel=match, and HtmlML's Avalonia projection still models only one scalar per corner, so elliptical vertical paint is not claimed. WPT does not currently combine this rule with the connected-component composition of var()-substitution plus additive calc(max()) used values; the native/portable raster spike covers that exact composition.
Requires WPT check-layout-th.js support and flexbox support styles; add as the next adapter facility.

excluded.reason: Not observed in the supported connected-component interaction corpus.
Not observed in the supported connected-component interaction corpus.
Outside the local trusted chart-host profile.
Only the controls and input contracts exercised by the connected-component corpus are in scope.
The conformance lane is deterministic and headless; real interactions remain in application-owned parity probes.
